description: A few fragments stuck together. The main one is a piece from a document written by Halfon b. Menashshe Halevi (dates: 1100–38). Mentions some neighborhoods of Fustat, including Qālūs and Sūq al-Kabira, and descriptions of a property. Probably a deed of sale. The note on verso may be a filing note or may be unrelated. AA. ASE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
